memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: 英國英格蘭爾爾 易亞斯特
zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery de Bulkeley於1388年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Sir Richard Bulkeley19歲，母親Margery Venables19歲。她於大約1402年與Lawrence de Warrene在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在英國爾波易頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: 英国英格兰爾爾 易亞斯特
zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery de Bulkeley于1388年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Richard Bulkeley19岁，母亲Margery Venables19岁。她于大约1402年与Lawrence de Warrene在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在英国爾波易頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery de Bulkeley was born in 1388, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Bulkeley, was 19 and her mother, Margery Venables, was 19. She married Lawrence de Warrene about 1402, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1440, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery de Bulkeley est née en 1388, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Bulkeley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margery Venables, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Lawrence de Warrene environ 1402, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery de Bulkeley 1388 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Bulkeley 19 und ihre Mutter Margery Venables 19. Sie hat um 1402 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lawrence de Warrene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Poynton, Cheshire, England.

Lei sposato Lawrence de Warrene circa 1402, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel Poynton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery de Bulkeleyが1388年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Bulkeleyは19歳，母Margery Venablesは19歳であった。約1402年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでLawrence de Warreneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery de Bulkeley(이)가 1388년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Bulkeley(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Venables(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Lawrence de Warrene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery de Bulkeley nasceu em 1388, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Bulkeley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margery Venables, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Lawrence de Warrene aproximadamente 1402, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery de Bulkeley родилась в 1388 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Bulkeley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Venables, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lawrence de Warrene около 1402 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.
